videos.title: Learn CSS Transform In 15 Minutes
videos.description: Covers all CSS transform functions: rotate, scale, translate, skew, and combining multiple transforms with practical examples.

videos.title: A new way to do CSS transforms!
videos.description: Overview of the new individual transform properties (rotate, scale, translate) that work alongside the traditional transform property.

videos.title: #30 CSS Transform Property - CSS Full Tutorial
videos.description: Detailed look at the CSS transform property covering translate, scale, skew, rotate, transform-origin, and matrix transformations.

videos.title: 3D CSS - lighting, animations, and more!
videos.description: Building 3D scenes with CSS transforms including perspective, cube construction, and animated bouncing ball with realistic physics.
